title: Twilight Delight
description: More delicious food in the Twilight Forest!
body:
Did you think about more eating ideas about the Boss such as the Hydra and the Naga?

Don't you think the food in the Twilight Forest is too few to call them "We Dine At Eternal Sundown"?

This mod can satisfy twilight adventurer's appetite!

The mod add 19 new food and 4 drinks in the Twilight Forest, and the knives which are crafted with materials from the Twilight Forest!

THE TRUE "WE DINE AT ETERNAL SUNDOWN'!
